name: unified-hadith
description: An evidence-first interchange standard and scholarly workbench for hadith studies.

scripts.test: node tests/run-tests.mjs && node tests/corpus-tests.mjs && node tests/parallel-tests.mjs && node tests/narrator-tests.mjs && node tests/narrator-authority-tests.mjs && node tests/attested-authority-tests.mjs && node tests/interchange-tests.mjs && node tests/sdk-tests.mjs && node tests/structural-conformance-tests.mjs && npm run build --silent && node tests/web-tests.mjs && node tests/release-tests.mjs
scripts.refresh:data: npm run import:corpus && npm run discover:parallels && npm run build:narrators && npm run match:narrator-authority && npm run import:attested-authority
